ingredients: 1 1/2 lb extra-large or jumbo shrimp, shell-on and deveined
Brine: 1/3 cup kosher salt, 1/4 cup sugar, 2 tbsp Old Bay seasoning, 1/2 tsp black pepper
Cocktail sauce: 1 cup ketchup, 3 tbsp prepared horseradish, 1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce, 1 1/2 tsp hot sauce, 1/2 tsp celery salt, 2 tbsp fresh lemon juice
steps: Make sauce: stir together ketchup, horseradish, Worcestershire, hot sauce, celery salt and lemon juice; chill.
Make poaching liquid: bring water to a simmer with salt, sugar, Old Bay and pepper.
Add shrimp and poach just until pink and barely cooked through, about 2 to 3 minutes depending on size.
Drain and immediately chill shrimp in ice water (or spread on a tray and chill) to stop cooking; peel if needed, leaving tails on.
Serve shrimp cold with cocktail sauce and lemon wedges (over ice if desired).
tips: Do not overcook shrimp; chill immediately after poaching for the best texture.
